variants.name: v1.7-shipped
variants.desc: V1 baseline: RSI 75, no weekly, no no-go cap, 1-bar daily alignment

variants.name: v2-nogo-only
variants.desc: V2 minimal: RSI 70 + 45/55 no-go cap, 1-bar daily alignment

variants.name: v2-weekly-or
variants.desc: V2 medium: + weekly RSI OR MACD rising (1-bar daily alignment)

variants.name: v2-slope
variants.desc: *** V2 + 2-bar daily slope (RSI & MACD rising 2 days running) ***

variants.name: v2-method
variants.desc: V2 strict: + weekly RSI AND MACD rising (1-bar daily alignment)
